_comment: Copy the relevant block into your MCP client configuration. Replace the host with your server IP.
_claude_desktop_note: In Claude Desktop (claude_desktop_config.json), use the 'mcpServers' block above directly.
_continue_note: In Continue.dev (.continue/config.json), add the entry under 'mcpServers'.
_cursor_note: In Cursor (.cursor/mcp.json), use the same 'mcpServers' format.
_available_tools: health — check if the service is running
api_start_tasks — start a generation job (categories, prompts, or CSV)
api_results_{category} — get detailed results for one category
api_create_pr_from_results — create GitHub PRs from completed results
api_retry_pr_{job_id} — retry PR creation for a completed job
api_version_bump — tag current version and create new release branch
api_promote_to_main — promote release branch to main
